diagrams.title: Thread Models Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of three thread mapping models showing how user threads map to kernel threads
elements: Many-to-Many: Many users → Many (or fewer) kernels
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how different thread models affect parallelism and performance

diagrams.title: Thread Lifecycle State Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the states a thread goes through from creation to termination
elements: Transitions: create, scheduler dispatch, block, unblock, exit
diagrams.purpose: Understanding thread scheduling and state transitions in operating systems

diagrams.title: Mutex Lock Mechanism
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how mutual exclusion works with shared resource access
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how mutex ensures only one thread accesses critical section at a time

diagrams.title: Thread Pool Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the structure of a thread pool handling multiple tasks
elements: Task Completion and return to pool
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how thread pools reduce overhead and improve efficiency
